name: Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg substitute, sweetener, and vanilla to the creamed mixture and beat for 30 seconds.
3. Stir flour, baking powder, dry milk, and cocoa into a separate bowl until combined.
4. Gradually add water to the creamed mixture with the flour mixture, stirring only until smooth.
5. Pour batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean and the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
7. Cool to room temperature.
8. Cut into 4 x 4 pieces, yielding 16 equal servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 2 FAT EXCHANGES
CAL: 157
CHO: 16g
PRO: 3g
FAT: 9g
Low-Sodium Diets: Use salt-free margarine and low-sodium baking powder.
